case_title: N. R. PATEL VS. LINDA ROBERSON et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, N. R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBINSON, LINDA , AKA LINDA ROBERSON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 106 SIXTH STREET, #304, SAN FRANCISCO, A 94103, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-13-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON DEC-15-2010 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT LINDA ROBINSON'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

FEES NOT PAID. FILINGS OF LINDA ROBERSON ARE STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.
